props.name: currencies
props.comment: Provide to enable currency selection; stores composite { amount, currency }.

props.name: currency
props.comment: ISO-4217 currency code when storage is a plain number.

props.name: displayLocale
props.comment: Override the user's app locale for formatting symbol/step.

props.name: storeAsMinorUnits
props.comment: Multiply displayed major units by 100 on write so storage is integer cents.
